{"key_event":"Decentralization and European constraints temper Jacobin state","reasoning":"Civil society remained exceptionally strong, as alternance, mass school and student protests, local elected authorities, and anti-racist mobilization checked the state, though deindustrialization and union decline slightly weakened organized labor. State capacity stayed very high through welfare expansion, nationalizations, policing, and administration, but EMS/Single Market discipline, austerity, privatizations, cohabitation, abolition of capital punishment, and decentralization reduced discretionary central power.","society_change":-0.1,"society_power":9.0,"state_change":-0.3,"state_power":8.7}
